task: Find the most reviewed gluten-free multivitamins from CVS Health Brand under $15.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the information-finding task using search-indexed CVS pages despite direct site access issues. The final answer identifies CVS Women’s Daily Multivitamin Gummies as the most reviewed CVS-brand gluten-free multivitamin under $15, supported by CVS search excerpts showing it in the 'Gluten Free Multivitamins for Women' category with 274 reviews and a starting price of $9.49 (search_d640...#5 / search_53bb...#1). The comparison table also lists other CVS-brand gluten-free multivitamins under $15 with review counts and prices backed by CVS category/review excerpts. Although the agent could not browse CVS directly, the extracted CVS evidence is sufficient and the core result is correct.
final_result_response:
I found the highest-reviewed CVS Health gluten-free multivitamin under $15:

| Rank | Product | Price | Reviews | Gluten-free confirmed? |
|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| 1 | CVS Women’s Daily Multivitamin Gummies | $9.49 and up | 274 | Yes, listed in CVS “Gluten Free Multivitamins for Women” category |
| 2 | CVS Women’s Multivitamin Gummies, 70 CT | $11.29 | 137 | Yes |
| 3 | CVS Men’s Daily Multivitamin Gummies | $9.49 | 116 | Yes |
| 4 | CVS Prenatal Vitamin Gummies, 90 CT | $14.69 | 88 | Yes |
| 5 | CVS Multivitamin Daily Gummies | $10.19 | 72 | Yes |
| 6 | CVS Children’s Multivitamin Gummies, 70 CT | $6.89 | 50 | Yes |

Best pick: **CVS Women’s Daily Multivitamin Gummies** with **274 reviews**, starting at **$9.49**. CVS lists it in the gluten-free women’s multivitamin category, with “CVS Women’s Daily Multivitamin Gummies,” 274 reviews, and a $9.49 starting price. <citation refs="search_d640a72a60104a389fb613894bbd7301#5">CVS gluten-free women’s multivitamin listing shows “CVS Women's Daily Multivitamin Gummies,” “CVS,” “274,” and “$9.49 – $18.19.”</citation>
action_history: Opening CVS: const cvsPage1 = await openTab('https://www.cvs.com/');
Retrying CVS product search: const cvsPage2 = await openTab('https://www.cvs.com/search?searchTerm=CVS%20Health%20gluten%20free%20multivitamin');
Opening CVS home again: const cvsPage3 = await openTab('https://www.cvs.com');
